name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, compliance reporting delays cause project delays. We generate standardized compliance reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports for multiple projects.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports for multiple projects.
